cases.label: happy_path

input.strategy_route: Promote a light-medical clinic around pore and acne-mark consultation using trust-first messaging and a booking CTA
input.offer_info: consult-first route, no medical cure claims, clear suitability framing
input.audience_segment: local users dealing with visible pores, acne marks, and hesitation about first visits

mustInclude: trust and process proof before price
CTA that collects concern and booking window

cases.label: long_term_case

input.strategy_route: Write a soft re-engagement message for existing light-medical clients approaching a review or maintenance point
input.offer_info: recheck reminder based on timing and current state
input.audience_segment: past clients who completed an earlier visit and may now be ready for a review

mustInclude: CTA tied to timing or current state

input.strategy_route: Rewrite a light-medical promo that currently overuses before-after claims and absolute efficacy wording
